text:
Created attachment 150068
Patch for net-mgmt/pandorafms_* (revised)

* update patch against recent ports tree
* Removed unnecessary "@dir" in plists
* Added security patch for WLB-2014110100 to pandorafms_console
  See http://cxsecurity.com/issue/WLB-2014110100 for detail.
